creator: svysh.fbsd@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 147114
patch for updating port

- update 1.42 -> 1.44
	changes:
	http://cpansearch.perl.org/src/MSCHILLI/Log-Log4perl-1.44/Changes

- add LICENCE according to the last section of 
	http://cpansearch.perl.org/src/MSCHILLI/Log-Log4perl-1.44/README

- maintainer lth@FreeBSD.org CC'ed

Tested on FreeBSD-10.0-amd64 (log attached) with:
poudriere testport -j 10-amd64 -o devel/p5-Log-Log4perl > p5-Log-Log4perl.log
